zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Donnington於1509年出生在英國米德萊可哈可尼時，她的父親John Donington26歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pye22歲。她於1523年與Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave在英國素福爾可亨格拉福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1561年12月20日在她的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可亨格拉福聖 約翰 拉特藍恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Donnington于1509年出生在英国米德萊可哈可尼时，她的父亲John Donington26岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pye22岁。她于1523年与Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave在英国素福爾可亨格拉福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1561年12月20日在她的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可亨格拉福聖 約翰 拉特藍恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Donnington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Donington (Lincs, Shrops), Donington on Bain (Lincs), Donington le Heath, Castle Donington (Leics), or Donnington (Berks, Gloucs, Herefs, Shrops).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Donnington was born in 1509, in Hackney, Middlesex, England, her father, John Donington, was 26 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pye, was 22. She married Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave in 1523, in Hengrave, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 20 December 1561, in her hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in St John Lateran's Church, Hengrave, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Donnington est née en 1509, à Hackney, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Donington, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pye, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave en 1523, à Hengrave, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 décembre 1561, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à St John Lateran's Church, Hengrave, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1523 in Hengrave, Suffolk, England Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Donnington è nata il nel 1509 nel Hackney, Middlesex, England, sua padre, John Donington, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pye, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave nel 1523, nel Hengrave, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 dicembre 1561, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a St John Lateran's Church, Hengrave, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Donningtonが1509年にイギリスミッドレセックスハクニーで生まれた時，父John Doningtonは26歳，母Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pyeは22歳であった。1523年にイギリススフォルクヘングラブでLord Thomas Kytson van Hengraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1561年12月20日に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクヘングラブスト ジョン ラテラン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Stoke Newington St Matthias, Middlesex,: 영국 미들레세스 스토크 뉴잉턴 스트 맷히아스
ko.Church of the Reconciliation, Hengrave,: 영국 수폴크 헨그레이브 스트 존 레이터아'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Donnington(이)가 1509년 영국 미들레세스 해c니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Donington(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pye(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1523년 영국 수폴크 헨그레이브에서 Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1561년 12월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 헨그레이브 스트 존 레이터아'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.Church of the Reconciliation, Hengrave,: St John Lateran's Church, Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, England, U: Bakewell Circuit, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Donnington nasceu em 1509, em Hackney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Donington, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pye, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave em 1523, em Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1561, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em St John Lateran's Church, Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Stoke Newington St Matthias, Middlesex,: сток нюингтон ст мэттяс, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.Church of the Reconciliation, Hengrave,: ст джон лэитиран'с чурч, хенграв, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Donnington родилась в 1509 г. в местности хаккни, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Donington было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pye, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave в 1523 г. в местности хенграв, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 декабря 1561 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джон лэитиран'с чурч, хенграв, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Donnington nació en 1509, en Hackney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Donington, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Courtenay Pye, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lord Thomas Kytson van Hengrave en 1523, en Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1561, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en St John Lateran's Church, Hengrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
